task_completion.description: Open a NinjaTrader 8 chart for the SPY instrument
task_completion.visual_evidence: NinjaTrader 8 application is open with a chart window displaying 'SPY' in its tab or title bar.

task_completion.description: Configure the chart for a Weekly period and 700 days of data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Series configuration window shows 'Type' set to 'Weekly' and 'Days to load' set to 700, or the chart header explicitly indicates a Weekly timeframe for SPY.

task_completion.description: Enable logarithmic scaling on the chart's price axis
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Axis Properties window shows 'Logarithmic' checked/selected for the Y-axis, or the Y-axis visually displays logarithmic scaling (uneven vertical spacing between major price intervals).

task_completion.description: Add a 40-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator to the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indicators configuration window shows 'SMA' added with 'Period' set to 40, or the chart legend/header displays 'SMA(40)' alongside a moving average line on the chart.

Interaction with the 'Workspaces' menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center to save the workspace, or File Explorer showing a recently updated workspace .xml file in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.

task_completion.description: Export the chart image to the specified Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer open to C:\Users\Docker\Documents showing a file named 'weekly_spy_log.png', or a 'Save As' dialog confirming the export to this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart rather than mocking the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through NinjaTrader 8 menus, Data Series dialogs, and Indicator windows.

integrity.description: The exported image is a genuine NinjaTrader chart export.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported image 'weekly_spy_log.png' (if opened) matches the distinct visual style of NinjaTrader 8 charts, not a generic Python/matplotlib plot.

integrity.description: The agent actually exported the chart instead of renaming an existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the 'Export -> Image' function in NinjaTrader rather than just using the terminal or file explorer to rename a pre-existing image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target instrument is SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust). Required chart configuration: Weekly period type, 700 days to load, Logarithmic axis scaling, and a 40-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator. The workspace must be saved (default directory: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces) and the chart exported to exactly C:\Users\Docker\Documents\weekly_spy_log.png.
